title: Dodging a Bullet
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by liquidation exploit on DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls liquidate() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK liquidate() if FLASHLOAN_BORROW in same tx
summary: A rounding error in Vesu's liquidation system could have been exploited with flash loans, but was caught and fixed before any funds were lost.
